name: aeo-basis-plugin-marketplace
description: Accounting firm knowledge base — BK, TX, FP&A, OPS

plugins.name: accounting-foundation
plugins.description: Cross-cutting accounting knowledge: COA, financial statements, categorization rules, entity profile

plugins.name: bookkeeping
plugins.description: Transaction processing through monthly close: bank rec, payroll, 1099, catch-up, audit support

plugins.name: tax-prep
plugins.description: Federal Form 1120, state returns, foreign ownership filings, tax planning, e-filing

plugins.name: financial-planning
plugins.description: Budgeting, variance analysis, financial modeling, strategic advisory, ASC 740 tax provision

plugins.name: firm-operations
plugins.description: Practice management, engagement letters, QC/peer review, data governance, workflow automation

plugins.name: qbo-integration
plugins.description: QuickBooks Online platform integration: API patterns, COA management, bookkeeping ops, reporting, audit
